title: psiadia mollissima
intro: Psiadia mollissima is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, specifically in the island of Corsica, and is also known as Corsican sagewort or soft psiadia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to help with digestive issues and skin problems. Psiadia mollissima can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in creams and ointments for topical applications.
